title: hieracium amplexicaule subsp. cadinense
intro: Hieracium amplexicaule subsp. cadinense is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as a type of hawkweed, a flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy for overall health benefits. In terms of herbal preparations, Hieracium amplexicaule subsp. cadinense is typically consumed as a tea or infusion, or used in the form of a tincture or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
